headline: Packaging, Forest Products Face Lackluster Demand, Weak Volumes, BofA Says
summary: Packaging and forest products companies face lackluster demand and weak volumes outside beverage can

headline: IP temporarily closes Alabama containerboard mill following storm
summary: While the company doesn’t “have a full timeline” for repairs needed on the rain-damaged roof, it hopes to resume operations in August, according to an IP spokesperson.

headline: International Paper Shares Slip After BofA Downgrades Stock to Neutral (IP)
summary: International Paper (NYSE:IP) shares fell 1. 0% in premarket trading after BofA Securities lowered its recommendation on the packaging company from Buy to Neutral and reduced its price target to $41 from $44.
